dag_flow_prompt: Fix the 500 error in auth.js. The password validation is failing.
baseline_prompt: Fix the 500 error in auth.js. The password validation is failing.

user_context.persona: a senior developer doing an emergency hotfix on a production authentication bug

feature_requirements.bug_description: The login endpoint returns HTTP 500. The root cause is that bcrypt.compare() is not being awaited — it returns a Promise that is always truthy, bypassing password validation entirely.
feature_requirements.expected_fix: Add the missing 'await' keyword before bcrypt.compare() in the login handler
feature_requirements.file_to_fix: src/routes/auth.js (or src/middleware/auth.js depending on codebase layout)
feature_requirements.urgency: Production incident — minimal changes only. Fix the bug, don't refactor.
feature_requirements.tests: Run npm test after the fix to confirm the login tests pass

user_context.answering_style: Urgent and direct. Very short answers. Already knows what the bug is.
